# cmccloudv2_kafka_topic (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_kafka_topic" "kafka_topic" {
    instance_id        = "c40d86f2-7b91-4059-b04f-8af41ddf60d1"
    name               = "Topic-adex"
    partition_count    = 9
    replication_factor = 2
    rentation_day      = 7
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The id of the Kafka instance
- `name` (String) The name of the Kafka topic

### Optional

- `partition_count` (Number) Number of partitions in a topic. More partitions = more parallel processing (higher throughput).
- `rentation_day` (Number) Number of partitions in a topic. More partitions = more parallel processing (higher throughput).
- `replication_factor` (Number) Number of copies of each partition across brokers. Higher = better fault tolerance and data safety.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
